Sub-themes: Perceived Fairness and Sense of Belonging (https://www.notion.so/Perceived-Fairness-and-Sense-of-Belonging-33e60bfb014e81c79ba6e8d41b2128e7?pvs=21)

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme participants who report gender-equitable attitudes across four defined domains on a validated gender attitudes scale, reported separately for female and male respondents at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme participants who report gender-equitable attitudes across four defined domains covering girls' right to education, women's right to community participation, acceptability of gender-based restrictions, and shared household learning responsibility, used as a norm change outcome indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme participants who report feeling safe to share opinions and comfortable raising concerns in the programme environment, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey, disaggregated by priority group
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme participants who report feeling safe to share opinions without fear of judgment and comfortable raising concerns with programme staff, used as a psychological safety indicator for authentic participation among marginalised participants.
Sub-themes: Perceived Fairness and Sense of Belonging (https://www.notion.so/Perceived-Fairness-and-Sense-of-Belonging-33e60bfb014e81c79ba6e8d41b2128e7?pvs=21)

Indicator statement: Proportion of caregivers in multi-caregiver households who report shared agreement with at least one other household caregiver on a specific learning-support arrangement for their child in the current period, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of caregivers in multi-caregiver households who report shared agreement with at least one other household caregiver on a specific approach to supporting the child's learning in the current period, used as a proxy for household coordination on learning-support planning.

Indicator statement: Proportion of caregivers who report having a concrete learning-support plan for their child with at least one specifically described action in the current period, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of caregivers who report having a concrete and nameable learning-support plan for their child with at least one specifically described action in the current period, used as a proxy for intentional learning-support planning as a higher-order home engagement behaviour.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners who report that household responsibilities rarely or never prevented them from doing homework or studying in the school term prior to the survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of learners who report that household responsibilities rarely or never prevented them from doing homework or studying in the school term prior to the survey, used as a child-reported proxy for household demand interference with home study time.

Indicator statement: Proportion of households meeting at least three of four defined physical home learning environment dimensions at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of households meeting at least three of four defined physical home learning environment dimensions, study space, lighting, basic materials, and freedom from noise and disruption, used as a composite structural quality indicator for the physical home learning environment.
Sub-themes: Material and Physical Home Learning Conditions (https://www.notion.so/Material-and-Physical-Home-Learning-Conditions-33e60bfb014e813093cddd68a1e6bcab?pvs=21)

Indicator statement: Proportion of households with access to a qualifying device and reliable connectivity for digital learning during study hours at least three days per week, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of households with access to both a qualifying device and reliable connectivity for digital learning during study hours, used as a conditional structural equity indicator applicable only in programme contexts with a digital learning component.
Sub-themes: Material and Physical Home Learning Conditions (https://www.notion.so/Material-and-Physical-Home-Learning-Conditions-33e60bfb014e813093cddd68a1e6bcab?pvs=21)

Indicator statement: Proportion of households with reliable and adequate lighting available during the child's study hours on at least four of five school evenings per week, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of households with reliable and adequate lighting available during the child's study hours on school evenings, used as a physical infrastructure indicator for a frequently overlooked structural barrier to home-based learning in low-income and rural contexts.
Sub-themes: Material and Physical Home Learning Conditions (https://www.notion.so/Material-and-Physical-Home-Learning-Conditions-33e60bfb014e813093cddd68a1e6bcab?pvs=21)

Indicator statement: Proportion of households where the child has access to a programme-defined minimum set of basic learning materials at home, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of households where the child has access to a programme-defined minimum set of basic learning materials at home, used as a structural resource indicator for the material precondition for effective home-based learning.
Sub-themes: Material and Physical Home Learning Conditions (https://www.notion.so/Material-and-Physical-Home-Learning-Conditions-33e60bfb014e813093cddd68a1e6bcab?pvs=21)

Indicator statement: Proportion of vulnerable learners who progressed to the next grade and met the defined minimum competency threshold in at least two core subject areas, in the most recent completed school year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of vulnerable learners who progressed to the next grade and met a defined minimum competency threshold in at least two core subject areas, used as a learning quality indicator for whether grade progression among vulnerable learners reflects genuine academic achievement.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners who report feeling physically safe on the route to and from the programme learning space in the school term prior to the survey, measured on a structured instrument
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of learners who report feeling physically safe on the route to and from the programme learning space in the school term prior to the survey, used as a route safety indicator for the travel dimension of learning environment access quality.
Sub-themes: Safety, dignity and respect in learning spaces (https://www.notion.so/Safety-dignity-and-respect-in-learning-spaces-31260bfb014e80ac91f0cad9217af2fc?pvs=21)

Indicator statement: Rate of reported incidents of humiliation, bullying, and discrimination per 100 enrolled learners per school term, disaggregated by incident type, verified through incident register data
Indicator descriptor: Measures the number of reported incidents of humiliation, bullying, and discrimination per 100 enrolled learners per school term, disaggregated by incident type, used as a system functionality indicator for the programme's incident reporting mechanism and a baseline for interpreting the learning environment safety profile.
Sub-themes: Safety, dignity and respect in learning spaces (https://www.notion.so/Safety-dignity-and-respect-in-learning-spaces-31260bfb014e80ac91f0cad9217af2fc?pvs=21)

Indicator statement: Proportion of logged incidents of humiliation, bullying, or discrimination that received a documented investigation, resolution, and communication within the programme-defined response timeframe in the school term
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of logged incidents of humiliation, bullying, or discrimination that were investigated, resolved, and communicated to the affected learner or caregiver within the programme-defined response timeframe in the school term, used as a safeguarding accountability indicator for incident response quality.
Sub-themes: Safety, dignity and respect in learning spaces (https://www.notion.so/Safety-dignity-and-respect-in-learning-spaces-31260bfb014e80ac91f0cad9217af2fc?pvs=21)

Indicator statement: Proportion of observed programme sessions in which the facilitator demonstrates at least four of five defined differentiated instruction behaviours, assessed through structured observation across the programme year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of observed programme sessions in which the facilitator demonstrates at least four of five defined differentiated instruction behaviours, used as a facilitation quality indicator for whether learning delivery is accessible to learners with diverse needs, abilities, and paces.

Indicator statement: Whether adapted learning materials exist for each identified learner access need and at least 80 percent of learners requiring adapted materials report receiving and using them, assessed annually
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether the programme has adapted materials available for each identified learner access need and whether at least 80 percent of learners requiring adapted materials report receiving and using them, used as a material equity indicator for the resource infrastructure of inclusive pedagogy.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners who report adequate perceived content accessibility across comprehension, help-seeking comfort, and pace appropriateness dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey, disaggregated by disability status
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of learners who report being able to understand programme content, feeling comfortable seeking clarification, and experiencing the pace of sessions as appropriate, used as a learner-side accessibility indicator for whether inclusive facilitation practices are experienced as effective.

Indicator statement: Proportion of observed programme sessions in which the facilitator demonstrates all four defined inclusive formative assessment practices, assessed through structured observation across the programme year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of observed programme sessions in which the facilitator demonstrates all four defined inclusive formative assessment practices, used as a responsive teaching indicator for whether facilitators are actively monitoring and adjusting during sessions to prevent learners from being left behind.

Indicator statement: Proportion of evidence citations in the programme decision log that are substantive, meeting criteria of retrievability, prior production date, and direct relevance to the decision, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of evidence citations in the programme decision log that are substantive, meaning the cited evidence is retrievable, was produced before the decision, and contains findings directly relevant to the decision, used as an evidence quality indicator distinguishing genuine evidence use from nominal compliance.

Indicator statement: Proportion of major programme decisions in the reporting year that are documented with a qualifying reference to a named monitoring, evaluation, or feedback evidence source, verified through the programme decision log
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of major programme decisions in the reporting year that are documented with a qualifying reference to a named monitoring, evaluation, or feedback evidence source, used as a decision accountability indicator for whether evidence use in decision-making is recorded and verifiable.

Indicator statement: Proportion of documented programme adaptations in the reporting year that are traceable to a specific named evidence source or learning review finding, verified through the programme decision log and adaptation records
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of documented programme adaptations in the reporting year that are traceable to a specific named evidence source or learning review finding, meeting criteria of documentation, source traceability, prior production date, and plausible described link, used as the adaptive management outcome indicator for the evidence use and adaptation subtheme.

Indicator statement: Proportion of participant feedback items and complaints received in the reporting year that were acknowledged, investigated where required, and responded to within the programme-defined response timeframe
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of participant feedback items and complaints received in the reporting year that were acknowledged within five working days, investigated where required, and responded to with a communication to the originating participant within the programme-defined response timeframe, used as the outcome indicator for feedback loop closure.

Indicator statement: Proportion of scheduled internal monitoring data review sessions that were held and produced a documented output in the reporting year, verified through programme meeting records
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of scheduled internal monitoring data review sessions that were held and produced a documented output, discussion notes or action points, in the reporting year, used as a process fidelity indicator for the operational foundation of the monitoring and data use culture.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme facilitators who report both observing a colleague's session and having their own session observed by a colleague, both followed by structured feedback, in the 12 months prior to the survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme facilitators who report both observing at least one colleague's session and having their own session observed by a colleague, both followed by structured feedback, in the 12 months prior to the survey, used as a collective professional learning indicator for peer observation practice.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme staff who report adequate confidence in reading, interpreting, and engaging with monitoring data across comprehension, work relevance, and questioning comfort dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme staff who report feeling confident reading monitoring reports, identifying data implications for their work, and comfortable raising questions about data quality or interpretation, used as a data literacy and confidence indicator for the human dimension of the monitoring and data use culture.

Indicator statement: Proportion of sampled operational decision records at team or site level that reference a specific monitoring data finding as part of the rationale, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of sampled operational decision records at team or site level that reference a specific monitoring data finding as part of the rationale, used as a data use culture outcome indicator for whether monitoring data is functioning as a day-to-day management tool.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme facilitators who report adequate perceived programme learning culture across growth valuation, development access, mistake culture, and insight-seeking dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme facilitators who report that the programme values their professional growth, provides development opportunities, treats mistakes as learning opportunities, and seeks their insights, used as a culture and climate indicator for the enabling environment of the staff and facilitator learning culture.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme facilitators who report adequate reflective practice engagement across individual reflection, structured peer discussion, and programme-created reflection space dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme facilitators who report regular post-session reflection, structured peer or supervisor discussion of practice, and programme-created space for professional reflection, used as an individual professional learning indicator for the staff and facilitator learning culture.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active programme facilitators who received at least one structured coaching session and participated in at least one professional development activity in the 12 months prior to the survey, verified through programme records
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of active programme facilitators who received at least one structured coaching session and participated in at least one professional development activity in the 12 months prior to the survey, used as a professional development investment indicator for the staff and facilitator learning culture.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme participants who report adequate trust in the programme's accountability practices across feedback seriousness, honesty, and partnership dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme participants who report trusting that the programme takes their feedback seriously, is honest about results and decisions, and treats them as genuine partners, used as a relational accountability indicator for the quality of the programme's downward accountability culture.

Indicator statement: Whether the programme's data quality feedback loop is functioning, evidenced by a concern log with timely responses and at least 70 percent staff awareness and confidence in the concern channel, assessed annually
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether the programme has a functioning data quality feedback loop, comprising at least one staff-raised concern responded to within ten working days and at least 70 percent staff awareness of and confidence in the concern channel, used as an internal data governance indicator for the monitoring and data use culture.

Indicator statement: Whether the programme produced and distributed an accessible results communication to at least 80 percent of programme sites in the reporting year, and the proportion of participants confirming receipt or attendance
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether the programme produced and distributed an accessible results communication to at least 80 percent of programme sites in the reporting year and the share of participants confirming receipt or attendance, used as a transparency indicator for downward accountability through results communication.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme participants who report knowing of at least one feedback or complaint mechanism and believing they can use it safely without negative consequences, verified through a naming prompt, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme participants, learners and caregivers, who report knowing of at least one feedback or complaint mechanism and believing they can use it safely, verified through a naming prompt, used as an accessibility indicator for the programme's downward accountability infrastructure.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners in programme-targeted grades who meet or exceed the defined minimum reading proficiency threshold on a validated assessment at the end of the most recent completed school year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of learners in programme-targeted grades who meet or exceed the defined minimum reading proficiency threshold on a validated assessment administered at the end of the school year, used as a foundational literacy achievement indicator for learning continuity and progression.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners in programme-targeted grades who meet or exceed the defined minimum numeracy proficiency threshold on a validated assessment at the end of the most recent completed school year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of learners in programme-targeted grades who meet or exceed the defined minimum numeracy proficiency threshold on a validated assessment administered at the end of the school year, used as a foundational numeracy achievement indicator paired with the reading proficiency indicator to build a complete foundational skills profile.

Indicator statement: Whether the programme provided structured transition support to final-year learners meeting defined criteria for information session content, institutional referral, and learner reach, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether the programme provided structured transition support to learners in the final year of the current educational level, meeting criteria for information session delivery, institutional referral, and at least 80 percent learner reach, used as a process indicator for transition support provision.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners identified with significant learning gaps who participated in at least three structured remediation or catch-up sessions within four weeks of identification, in the most recently completed school year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of learners identified with significant learning gaps who participated in at least three structured remediation or catch-up sessions within four weeks of identification, used as a programme response equity indicator for whether learning gap identification translates into remediation access.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners who accessed remediation and demonstrated measurable improvement on a follow-up assessment in the identified skill gap areas within the same school year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of learners who accessed remediation and demonstrated measurable improvement of at least one performance band or 15 percent score improvement on a follow-up assessment in the identified skill gap areas within the same school year, used as the learning recovery outcome indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners who experienced a qualifying absence or disruption event and received a structured diagnostic assessment within ten school days of return or resumption, in the most recently completed school year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of learners who experienced a significant absence or disruption event and received a structured diagnostic assessment covering at least two core foundational skill areas within ten school days of return or programme resumption, used as a system process indicator for learning gap identification coverage.

Indicator statement: Whether the programme has a functioning early attendance warning system meeting defined criteria for threshold identification, documented follow-up, and timely response rate, assessed each school term
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether the programme has a functioning early warning system that defines an attendance risk threshold, triggers documented follow-up before learners reach chronic absenteeism, and achieves at least 80 percent timely follow-up rate, used as a system functionality indicator for proactive attendance continuity management.

Indicator statement: Proportion of enrolled learners who missed more than 20 percent of scheduled school days in the most recent completed school term, verified through attendance records
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of enrolled learners who missed more than 20 percent of scheduled school days in the most recent completed school term, used as a structural continuity indicator for the proportion of learners whose attendance is disrupted enough to produce measurable learning loss.

Indicator statement: Proportion of caregivers who report both monitoring their child's daily school attendance and taking a specific follow-up action when unexplained absences are discovered, in the school term prior to the survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of caregivers who report both monitoring their child's daily school attendance and taking a specific described follow-up action when unexplained absences are discovered, used as a household-level attendance accountability indicator complementing the programme's attendance monitoring system.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners who successfully transitioned to the next educational level and maintained enrolment and attendance of at least 80 percent at least three months after transition enrolment
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of learners who successfully transitioned to the next educational level and maintained enrolment and attendance of at least 80 percent at the new institution at least three months after transition, used as a post-transition sustainability indicator for whether educational momentum is sustained beyond the initial transition enrolment point.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners enrolled in the programme in the previous school year who re-enrolled in the current school year, verified through enrolment records
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of learners enrolled in the programme in the previous school year who re-enrolled in the current school year, used as a system retention indicator for year-on-year enrolment continuity across the highest-risk dropout point in the annual cycle.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners who completed the final year of the current educational level and enrolled in the next educational level within one year of completion
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of learners who completed the final year of the current educational level and enrolled in the next educational level within one year, used as the primary transition outcome indicator for inter-level educational continuity and progression momentum.

Indicator statement: Proportion of caregivers who can describe their child's current reading level and name at least one specific skill area the child needs to improve, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of caregivers who can describe their child's current reading level and name at least one specific skill area the child needs to work on, used as a household learning recovery indicator for caregiver awareness of child learning level as an information precondition for targeted home support.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners in the final year of the current educational level and their caregivers who can correctly describe at least three of five defined transition pathway elements, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of learners in the final year of the current educational level and their caregivers who can correctly describe at least three of five defined transition pathway elements, used as a knowledge indicator for transition pathway awareness as a precondition for successful educational transition.

Indicator statement: Proportion of four defined diversity dimensions met by the governing board's composition in the reporting year, assessed through annual board composition review
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of four defined governance diversity dimensions met by the board composition, covering gender parity, age diversity, professional background diversity, and lived experience representation, used as a governance equity and representational legitimacy indicator.

Indicator statement: Whether the governing board met all three qualifying criteria for strategic oversight effectiveness in the reporting year, assessed through governance records and annual board self-assessment
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether the governing board demonstrated active strategic oversight in the reporting year by reviewing strategic performance against at least two objectives, reviewing the risk register at least twice, and reporting adequate governance decision-making confidence, used as a governance quality indicator for strategic oversight effectiveness.

Indicator statement: Proportion of scheduled governing body meetings that were convened and produced a qualifying governance record in the reporting year, verified through governance documentation
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of scheduled governing body meetings that were convened and produced a governance record meeting defined criteria for dating, quorum confirmation, decision documentation, and action accountability, used as a governance process fidelity indicator for the foundational structural condition of effective oversight.

Indicator statement: Proportion of governing board members who demonstrate adequate governance role clarity across role understanding, responsibility description, and appropriate challenge confidence dimensions, measured through annual structured self-assessment
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of board members who report adequate understanding of the distinction between their governance role and the management role, verified through a three-item structured self-assessment, used as a governance culture indicator for role clarity and boundary maintenance.

Indicator statement: Annual staff retention rate for permanent and ongoing fixed-term staff, excluding planned programme exits, disaggregated by role type and gender, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of permanent and ongoing fixed-term staff employed at the start of the reporting year who remained employed at the end of the same year, excluding planned programme exits, disaggregated by role type and gender, used as an organisational stability indicator for human capital retention.

Indicator statement: Proportion of eligible programme staff who have a current documented individual development plan agreed within the last 12 months and meeting defined quality criteria, disaggregated by role type and gender
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of eligible programme staff who have a current, documented individual development plan agreed within the last 12 months and containing at least one specific objective with a named activity and target date, used as a human capital investment indicator for staff development plan currency.

Indicator statement: Proportion of eligible programme staff who received a documented annual performance review completed and signed within the reporting year, disaggregated by role type and gender
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of eligible programme staff who received a documented annual performance review signed by both staff member and line manager within the reporting year, used as a human resources accountability indicator for universal performance review completion.

Indicator statement: Proportion of the annual programme budget covered by confirmed funding commitments at the start of the fiscal year, reported separately for core and restricted funding
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of the annual programme budget covered by confirmed funding commitments at the start of the fiscal year, reported separately for core and restricted funding, used as a financial planning security indicator for whether the programme has sufficient confirmed income to plan and deliver its activities with confidence.

Indicator statement: Funding source diversification assessed through the largest single funder concentration rate and the number of distinct source types contributing at least 5 percent of confirmed annual income, in the fiscal year
Indicator descriptor: Measures funding source diversification through funder concentration risk, whether any single funder accounts for more than 50 percent of confirmed annual income, and source type diversification index, the number of distinct source types contributing at least 5 percent of confirmed income, used as a financial resilience and sustainability indicator.

Indicator statement: Share of total confirmed received income attributable to the three largest donors in the fiscal year, reported with risk classification and year-on-year trend
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of total confirmed received income in the fiscal year attributable to the three largest donors, with rates above 70 percent classified as high concentration risk, used as an oligopoly income concentration indicator complementing the single-funder concentration metric to build a complete financial resilience picture.

Indicator statement: Proportion of priority external audiences defined in the communications plan who received at least two distinct mission-aligned communications in the reporting year, verified through communications records
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of priority external audiences defined in the programme's communications plan who received at least two distinct mission-aligned communications in the reporting year, used as a communications execution indicator for whether the programme is delivering against its planned audience reach commitments.

Indicator statement: Proportion of sampled external communications products meeting all four defined mission-alignment quality criteria, assessed through annual document review against the programme's messaging framework
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of sampled external communications products that meet all four defined mission-alignment quality criteria, covering mission accuracy, messaging consistency, factual correctness, and audience-appropriate framing, used as a communications content quality indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of formally logged internal delivery bottlenecks in the reporting period that were resolved with a documented action, date, and responsible party, verified through management system records
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of formally logged internal delivery bottlenecks in the reporting period that were resolved with a documented action, date, and responsible party, used as a systems functionality and operational accountability indicator for bottleneck identification and clearance.

Indicator statement: Proportion of resolved delivery bottlenecks that were closed within the programme-defined resolution timeframe from the date of logging, disaggregated by bottleneck severity and type, in the reporting period
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of resolved delivery bottlenecks that were closed within the programme-defined resolution timeframe from the date of logging, disaggregated by bottleneck severity and type, used as an operational performance quality indicator for timely clearance of delivery obstacles.

Indicator statement: Proportion of designated core implementation process instances scheduled in the quarter that were completed on or before the scheduled date within the defined tolerance window, disaggregated by process type
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of designated core implementation process instances scheduled for completion in the quarter that were completed on or before the scheduled date within a defined tolerance window, used as a process timeliness indicator for operational delivery schedule adherence.

Indicator statement: Proportion of designated core implementation process instances completed in the quarter that were executed in full accordance with their standard operating procedure, disaggregated by process type
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of designated core implementation process instances completed in the quarter that were executed in full accordance with their standard operating procedure, used as a process quality and organisational fidelity indicator distinguishing SOP compliance from on-time completion.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active service sites that received a qualifying operational readiness audit within the quarter, disaggregated by site type and geographic area
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of active service sites that received a qualifying operational readiness audit conducted by a trained auditor using the standardised audit tool within the quarter, used as a quality assurance system functionality indicator for audit coverage completeness.

Indicator statement: Proportion of audited service sites meeting the minimum operational readiness standard across all defined infrastructure domains at the time of quarterly audit, disaggregated by domain, site type, and geographic area
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of audited service sites that meet the minimum operational readiness standard across all defined infrastructure domains at the time of quarterly audit, used as an infrastructure quality indicator for whether delivery conditions are adequate for safe and effective programme activities.

Indicator statement: Proportion of enrolled programme youth who received at least one documented qualifying career, education, or transition guidance session in the reporting year, disaggregated by guidance domain, gender, age band, and vulnerable group status
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme-enrolled youth who received at least one documented qualifying career, education, or transition guidance session from a qualified provider in the reporting year, used as a service delivery coverage indicator for guidance provision reach across the enrolled youth population.

Indicator statement: Proportion of youth who received a qualifying guidance session and left with a documented personal pathway action naming a specific step and target date, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of youth who received a qualifying guidance session and left with a documented personal pathway action naming a specific step and target date, used as a guidance effectiveness indicator for whether guidance provision is producing actionable outputs that move youth closer to their pathway goals.

Indicator statement: Proportion of pathway options named by programme youth that meet all three defined realism criteria of geographic accessibility, financial feasibility, and entry requirement attainability, assessed at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of pathway options named by programme youth that meet all three defined realism criteria, geographic accessibility, financial feasibility, and entry requirement attainability, assessed through a brief structured guidance provider interview, used as a pathway knowledge quality indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth within two years of completing their current educational level who can name at least two distinct and specific pathway options after current schooling or training, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme youth within two years of completing their current educational level who can name at least two distinct and specific pathway options available to them after current schooling or training, used as a pathway option knowledge breadth indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who report engaging in at least one specific deliberate pathway planning activity in the 12 months prior to the survey, verified through a description prompt
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth who report engaging in at least one specific deliberate pathway planning activity in the 12 months prior to the survey, verified through a description prompt, used as a behavioural engagement indicator for the transition from pathway awareness to active forward planning.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who report adequate pathway decision-making self-efficacy across information-gathering, option comparison, and decision confidence dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth who report feeling capable of gathering pathway information, comparing options, and making a decision about their future even under uncertainty, used as a pathway decision-making self-efficacy indicator for the motivational and agentic dimension of pathway navigation.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth within two years of completing their current educational level who can articulate a specific and time-bound pathway goal meeting defined criteria, assessed through an enumerator-scored rubric at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth within two years of completing their current educational level who can articulate a specific and time-bound pathway goal meeting defined criteria for pathway type specificity, approximate timeline, and plausible contextual connection, used as a goal clarity indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who received a pathway referral and acted on it by contacting or attending the referred service or institution within three months of the referral, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth for whom a pathway referral was made who acted on that referral by contacting or attending the referred service or institution within three months, used as a referral effectiveness indicator for whether programme institutional connections are translating into real pathway navigation support.

Indicator statement: Whether the programme provided structured application support, facilitated at least one institutional connection, and reached at least 80 percent of final-year youth with practical navigation support in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether the programme provided structured application support, facilitated at least one institutional connection, and reached at least 80 percent of final-year youth with practical navigation support in the reporting year, used as a service delivery indicator for operational navigation support provision.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth within two years of completing their current educational level who submitted at least one application or registration for a next-level pathway in the 12 months prior to the survey, verified through naming and cross-referenced with referral records
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth within two years of completing their current educational level who submitted at least one application or registration for a next-level education, training, or livelihood pathway in the 12 months prior to the survey, used as an operational navigation outcome indicator for application completion as the most proximal indicator of transition initiation.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who report adequate caregiver support for pathway decision-making across encouragement, active discussion, and respect for youth choice dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth who report that their caregiver encourages pathway planning, has discussed pathway options with them in the last 12 months, and supports their own pathway choices, used as a household enabling environment indicator for caregiver support of youth pathway decision-making.

Indicator statement: Proportion of financially-constrained programme youth who submitted at least one application for financial support for their chosen next-level pathway, disaggregated by support type, gender, age band, and vulnerable group status
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of financially-constrained programme youth who successfully submitted at least one application for financial support for their chosen next-level pathway, used as an equity and operational navigation indicator for whether financial barriers to pathway entry are being addressed in practice.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme learners with matched SDQ scores who showed a reduction of at least two points in total difficulties score between baseline and follow-up assessment, with a minimum six-month interval
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of learners who showed a reduction of at least two points in SDQ total difficulties score between baseline and follow-up, used as a longitudinal change indicator for whether programme participation is associated with measurable improvement in emotional and behavioural wellbeing.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme learners whose SDQ total difficulties score falls within the normal range at the time of survey, assessed using a culturally adapted and locally validated version with a referral protocol in place
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme learners whose SDQ total difficulties score falls within the normal range at the time of survey, used as a population-level wellbeing monitoring indicator with the ethical and methodological safeguards required for SDQ deployment in community programme settings.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who report having at least one programme peer they would seek for help or advice when facing a difficulty, verified through a description prompt, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth who report having at least one programme peer they would seek for help or advice when facing a difficulty, used as a peer social resource indicator for the functional dimension of peer support access.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who report adequate positive future orientation across generalised optimism and personal agency belief dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth who report adequate positive future orientation across generalised optimism about their personal future and personal agency belief in their ability to improve their life, used as a prospective wellbeing indicator for sustained engagement with long-term educational and livelihood goals.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who report adequate peer social belonging across acceptance, group fit, and peer inclusion desire dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth who report feeling accepted, fitting in, and wanted as part of the programme peer group, used as a group membership and acceptance indicator for peer social belonging as distinct from institutional belonging and dyadic friendship.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who report adequate academic self-efficacy across task completion capability, help-seeking capability, and effort-outcome belief dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth who report adequate academic self-efficacy across task completion capability, help-seeking capability, and effort-outcome belief dimensions, used as a domain-specific capability belief indicator for the cognitive motivation dimension of learning engagement.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who report adequate sense of purpose across learning meaningfulness, personal connection, and contribution dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth who report adequate sense of purpose across learning meaningfulness, personal connection to learning content, and sense of contribution dimensions, used as a meaning-making indicator for the motivational dimension of sustained learning engagement.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who score at or above the adequacy threshold on a validated brief hope scale covering agency and pathway thinking dimensions, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth who score at or above the adequacy threshold on a validated brief hope scale covering agency thinking and pathway thinking, used as a positive psychological functioning indicator for hope as a motivational resource for goal pursuit and sustained learning engagement.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who report positive peer influence on learning engagement across peer encouragement of effort and peer valuing of programme engagement dimensions, measured on a structured instrument at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth who report that their programme peers encourage their effort and value engagement with the programme, used as a peer social norms indicator for whether the peer influence environment is amplifying or counteracting programme learning activities.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme youth who report having at least one trusted peer friendship within the programme context, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the share of programme youth who report having at least one trusted, mutually comfortable peer friendship within the programme context, used as a foundational social connectedness indicator for the minimum protective peer relationship condition.

Indicator statement: Proportion of designated programme practices that achieved formal documented incorporation into a public sector plan, guideline, or routine within 24 months of the programme start date, disaggregated by adoption level and practice type
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme practices designated for public sector adoption in the systems change plan that achieved formal documented incorporation into a public sector plan, guideline, or routine within 24 months of the programme start date, used as a systems change adoption rate indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of formally adopted programme practices that remain in active documented use and are confirmed by institutional staff at 12 months after formal incorporation, disaggregated by adoption level and practice type
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of formally adopted programme practices that remain in active use by the adopting institution at 12 months after the date of formal incorporation, verified through active documentation review and staff confirmation, used as a systems change sustainability indicator.

Indicator statement: Whether the programme conducted at least one qualifying advocacy activity directed at government incorporating documented community perspectives collected with informed consent in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether the programme conducted at least one qualifying advocacy activity directed at government that incorporated documented community perspectives collected with informed consent in the reporting year, used as an advocacy equity and legitimacy indicator for community voice in policy influence.

Indicator statement: Proportion of designated government counterparts who report adequate relationship quality with the programme across productivity, trust, and mutual benefit dimensions, assessed through annual structured interview or survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of designated government counterparts who report adequate relationship quality with the programme across productivity, trust, and mutual benefit dimensions, used as a government relationship quality indicator from the government perspective.

Indicator statement: Proportion of targeted government decision-makers who received at least one programme evidence product and can confirm awareness of at least one key finding in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of targeted government decision-makers who received at least one programme evidence product and can confirm awareness of at least one key finding in the reporting year, used as an evidence reach and uptake indicator for the precondition step of policy influence.

Indicator statement: Whether the programme has at least one qualifying formal documented engagement mechanism with a relevant government body that had at least one documented interaction in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether the programme has at least one formal documented engagement mechanism with a relevant government department or agency that had at least one documented interaction in the reporting year, used as a government relationship infrastructure indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of relevant government-convened forums and technical working groups on the programme register in which the programme actively participated in the reporting year, disaggregated by forum type and government level
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of relevant government-convened forums and technical working groups on the programme's forum register in which the programme actively participated in the reporting year, used as a government engagement presence indicator.

Indicator statement: Whether the programme submitted programme-generated evidence to at least one formal government policy or planning process and received acknowledgement in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether the programme submitted programme-generated evidence to at least one formal government policy, planning, or budget process and received acknowledgement in the reporting year, used as a policy influence process indicator for active evidence positioning in government decision-making.

Indicator statement: Whether the programme participated in at least one qualifying joint planning or co-design activity with a relevant government body producing a documented planning output in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether the programme participated in at least one qualifying joint planning or co-design activity with a relevant government body in which programme evidence or expertise contributed to a documented planning output, used as a collaboration depth indicator for the highest-order form of government engagement.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme advocacy targets for the reporting year for which there is verifiable evidence that programme evidence or recommendations contributed to a government decision, policy change, or practice modification
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme advocacy targets for the reporting year for which there is verifiable evidence that programme evidence or recommendations contributed to a government decision, policy change, or practice modification, used as a policy influence outcome indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of enrolled learners with documented disability identification who received at least one qualifying documented reasonable accommodation in the school term prior to the survey, disaggregated by disability type and gender
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of enrolled learners with documented disability identification who received at least one qualifying reasonable accommodation addressing their specific access need in the school term prior to the survey, used as an equity service delivery indicator for accommodation provision to learners with disabilities.

Indicator statement: Proportion of sampled disability accommodations assessed as meeting the learner's specific access need across type match, frequency and consistency, and learner-reported helpfulness criteria, in the school term prior to the survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of documented disability accommodations assessed as meeting the learner's specific access need across type match, frequency and consistency, and learner-reported helpfulness criteria, used as an accommodation quality indicator distinguishing adequate provision from nominal compliance.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners who report rarely or never experiencing hunger or fatigue preventing concentration at the start of learning sessions in the school term prior to the survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of learners who report rarely or never experiencing hunger or fatigue that prevents concentration at the start of learning sessions in the school term prior to the survey, used as a functional nutritional readiness indicator for whether physical state at session start enables cognitive engagement.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners who report consuming food before attending learning sessions on most days in the school term prior to the survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of learners who report consuming food before attending learning sessions on most days in the school term prior to the survey, used as a nutritional access indicator for the presence of a basic nutritional foundation as a precondition for sustained cognitive engagement.

Indicator statement: Proportion of enrolled learners whose illness-related session absence exceeded 20 percent of scheduled sessions in the school term prior to the survey, disaggregated by gender, age band, disability status, and community
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of enrolled learners whose illness-related session absence in the school term exceeded 20 percent of scheduled sessions, used as a health-related readiness severity indicator identifying learners for whom illness is a persistent and substantial barrier to learning participation requiring targeted support.

Indicator statement: Proportion of scheduled learning sessions missed due to illness or illness-related physical incapacity in the school term prior to the survey, disaggregated by gender, age band, disability status, and community
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of scheduled learning sessions missed by a learner due to illness or illness-related physical incapacity in the school term prior to the survey, used as a health-related learning readiness indicator for the frequency dimension of illness as a barrier to learning participation.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme learners who demonstrate adequate language of instruction proficiency across comprehension, oral expression, and reading decoding dimensions at enrolment or programme year start, disaggregated by home language, gender, and community
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme learners who demonstrate adequate language of instruction proficiency across comprehension, oral expression, and reading decoding dimensions at enrolment or programme year start, used as a cognitive access indicator for language as a primary barrier to learning engagement.

Indicator statement: Proportion of attended learning sessions in the school term for which the learner arrived with all required learning materials, disaggregated by gender, age band, household socioeconomic proxy, and community
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of attended learning sessions in the school term for which the learner arrived with all required materials, used as a session material preparedness indicator for whether learners are equipped to participate fully from the session start.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme learners who report adequate caregiver session preparation support across nutritional preparation, punctual departure, and material preparation on most days in the school term prior to the survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme learners who report that their caregiver ensured they ate before sessions, left home in time to arrive punctually, and had required materials on most days in the school term prior to the survey, used as a household enabling environment indicator for caregiver preparation support.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme learners who report feeling mentally ready and able to concentrate at the start of learning sessions on most days in the school term prior to the survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme learners who report feeling mentally ready and able to concentrate at the start of learning sessions on most days in the school term prior to the survey, used as a subjective cognitive readiness indicator complementing the observational sustained attention measure.

Indicator statement: Proportion of observed programme learners who demonstrate adequate sustained attention across task focus, instruction response, and task completion indicators at session start, assessed through structured facilitator observation in the school term prior to the survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of observed programme learners who demonstrate adequate sustained attention across three defined behavioural indicators in the first 15 minutes of a learning session, used as a cognitive readiness indicator for the attention prerequisite for learning engagement.

Indicator statement: Proportion of observed programme learners who demonstrate adequate physical alertness and readiness across alert appearance, physical settledness, and unprompted session engagement indicators at session start, assessed through structured facilitator observation in the school term prior to the survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of observed programme learners who demonstrate adequate physical alertness and readiness across alert appearance, physical settledness, and unprompted session engagement indicators at session start, used as a physical readiness indicator for the bodily precondition for learning engagement.

Indicator statement: Proportion of attended learning sessions in the school term for which the learner arrived on time and ready to engage at the scheduled start, disaggregated by gender, age band, distance from learning site, and community
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of attended learning sessions in the school term for which the learner arrived on time, defined as present and ready to engage at the scheduled start, used as a session punctuality indicator for whether learners are accessing the full scheduled learning opportunity.

Indicator statement: Proportion of early learning cohort learners who demonstrate adequate pre-literacy and pre-numeracy readiness across defined phonological awareness, print awareness, counting, and quantity comparison tasks at enrolment or programme year start, disaggregated by gender, home language, and community
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of early learning cohort learners who demonstrate adequate pre-literacy and pre-numeracy readiness across phonological awareness, print awareness, verbal counting, and quantity comparison tasks at enrolment or programme year start, used as a school readiness indicator for foundational instruction access.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active staff and volunteers who completed a qualifying safeguarding induction or refresher training within the reporting year, disaggregated by staff type and role category
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of active staff and volunteers who completed a qualifying safeguarding induction or refresher covering five defined content areas within the reporting year, used as a safeguarding knowledge and training coverage indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active staff and volunteers with a current signed code of conduct on record at the close of the reporting year, disaggregated by staff type and role category
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of all active staff and volunteers who have a current signed code of conduct on record at the close of the reporting year, used as a safeguarding compliance documentation indicator for the foundational written accountability instrument.

Indicator statement: Proportion of sampled referrals to external services that were conducted in full compliance with all required ethical referral steps, assessed through structured referral file audit in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of sampled referrals to external services in the reporting year that were conducted in full compliance with all required ethical referral steps, used as a service linkage quality indicator for whether referral practices respect participant autonomy, dignity, and privacy.

Indicator statement: Proportion of sampled child protection cases that were handled in full compliance with all required procedural steps, assessed through structured case file audit in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of sampled child protection cases in the reporting year that were handled in full compliance with all required procedural steps in the programme's documented child protection procedures, used as a case management quality indicator for safeguarding system functionality at the case level.

Indicator statement: Proportion of identified safeguarding risks with a documented and implemented mitigation action confirmed through follow-up verification, reported separately by severity level, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of risks identified in safeguarding risk assessments in the reporting year that have a documented and implemented mitigation action confirmed through follow-up verification, reported separately by risk severity level, used as a prevention quality indicator for risk mitigation follow-through.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active programme sites that completed a qualifying safeguarding risk assessment using the standardised tool within the reporting year, disaggregated by site type and geographic area
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of active programme sites that completed a qualifying safeguarding risk assessment using a standardised tool covering five risk domains and producing a written risk register within the reporting year, used as a prevention system coverage indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme learners who can name a specific qualifying person or role and describe at least one concrete step they would take to seek help if they felt unsafe, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme learners who can name a specific qualifying person or role they would go to if unsafe and describe at least one concrete help-seeking step, used as a safeguarding awareness indicator for functional help-seeking pathway knowledge.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners with functional help-seeking pathway knowledge who report feeling confident that their safeguarding contact would listen to and act on a concern they raised, at the time of survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of learners with functional pathway knowledge who report feeling confident that their safeguarding contact would listen to and act on their concern, used as a safeguarding trust indicator for whether the help-seeking pathway is psychologically accessible.

Indicator statement: Proportion of logged safeguarding concerns that received a documented formal acknowledgement from the designated safeguarding lead within 48 hours of logging, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of safeguarding concerns logged in the reporting year that received a documented formal acknowledgement from the designated safeguarding lead within 48 hours of logging, used as a reporting system responsiveness indicator for concern acknowledgement timeliness.

Indicator statement: Proportion of acknowledged safeguarding concerns for which a documented substantive first response action was taken within the policy-defined severity-differentiated timeframe, disaggregated by severity classification and concern type, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of acknowledged safeguarding concerns for which a documented substantive first response action was taken within the policy-defined severity-differentiated timeframe, used as a safeguarding response quality indicator for response timeliness.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active staff and volunteers who can name a designated safeguarding reporting channel and describe at least one aspect of how to use it, disaggregated by staff type, role category, and site, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of active staff and volunteers who can name a designated safeguarding reporting channel and describe at least one aspect of how to use it, used as a reporting system awareness indicator for functional reporting channel knowledge.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active staff and volunteers who correctly identify both an unambiguous and a less obvious safeguarding concern scenario as reportable and name an appropriate reporting channel, disaggregated by staff type, role category, and site, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of active staff and volunteers who correctly identify both an unambiguous and a less obvious safeguarding concern as reportable and name an appropriate reporting channel, used as a safeguarding recognition indicator for reporting threshold knowledge.

Indicator statement: Proportion of new implementing partners contracted in the reporting year who completed a qualifying safeguarding due diligence assessment covering five defined domains before contract signing
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of new implementing partners contracted in the reporting year who completed a qualifying five-domain safeguarding due diligence assessment before contract signing, used as a partnership accountability indicator for pre-contracting safeguarding screening.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active implementing partner contracts that contain all five defined minimum safeguarding requirements in explicit contract text at the close of the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of active implementing partner contracts at the close of the reporting year that contain all five defined minimum safeguarding requirements in explicit contract text, used as a partnership legal accountability indicator for contractual safeguarding obligation formalisation.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active implementing partners who received at least one qualifying safeguarding monitoring visit or audit within the reporting year, disaggregated by partner type and geographic area
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of active implementing partners who received at least one qualifying safeguarding monitoring visit or audit using a standardised tool and producing a written monitoring report within the reporting year, used as a partnership accountability indicator for partner safeguarding compliance verification.

Indicator statement: Proportion of implementing partners with identified safeguarding gaps who received at least one qualifying capacity support intervention addressing a documented gap within the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of implementing partners identified as having safeguarding gaps through monitoring who received at least one qualifying capacity support intervention addressing a documented gap within the reporting year, used as a partnership development indicator for safeguarding gap remediation support.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active staff and volunteers who score at or above the defined pass threshold on the annual safeguarding knowledge assessment across five defined knowledge domains, disaggregated by staff type and role category
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of active staff and volunteers who score at or above the defined pass threshold across five knowledge domains on the annual safeguarding knowledge assessment, used as a safeguarding capability indicator for training effectiveness and knowledge retention.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active staff and volunteers who report adequate safeguarding practice confidence across recognition confidence, action confidence, and organisational support confidence dimensions, assessed through anonymous annual survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of active staff and volunteers who report adequate confidence in recognising a safeguarding concern, knowing what to do, and feeling organisationally supported to act, used as a safeguarding culture indicator for practice confidence as distinct from safeguarding knowledge.

Indicator statement: Proportion of active programme teams that held at least two qualifying structured safeguarding supervision or reflection sessions within the reporting year, disaggregated by team type and site
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of active programme teams that held at least two qualifying structured safeguarding supervision or reflection sessions within the reporting year, used as a safeguarding culture indicator for regular structured team-level safeguarding practice.

Indicator statement: Proportion of qualifying structured safeguarding sessions that met all three defined content quality criteria in the reporting year, disaggregated by team type and site
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of qualifying structured safeguarding sessions in the reporting year that met three defined content quality criteria covering substantive content, a documented action or learning commitment, and adequate participant engagement, used as a safeguarding culture depth indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of qualifying professional learning activities in the school term that met all three defined quality criteria covering classroom practice focus, documented practice commitment, and participant self-report of useful insight, disaggregated by activity type and site
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of qualifying professional learning activities in the school term that met all three defined quality criteria covering classroom practice focus, documented practice commitment, and participant self-report of useful insight, used as a professional learning culture depth indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme teachers and facilitators who participated in at least the programme-defined minimum number of qualifying professional learning activities in the school term prior to the survey, disaggregated by activity type, gender, and site
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme teachers and facilitators who participated in at least the programme-defined minimum number of qualifying professional learning activities across three defined modalities in the school term prior to the survey, used as a professional learning culture indicator for participation coverage and frequency.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme teachers and facilitators who report at least one specific describable classroom practice change attributed to a peer learning interaction in the school term prior to the survey, disaggregated by gender, years of experience, and site
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme teachers and facilitators who report making at least one specific, describable classroom practice change attributed to a peer learning interaction in the school term prior to the survey, used as a professional learning transfer indicator for whether peer collaboration connects to classroom practice.

Indicator statement: Proportion of reported peer collaboration-attributed classroom practice changes that the teacher reports still applying at least four weeks after the prompting peer learning interaction, disaggregated by gender, years of experience, and site
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of reported peer collaboration-attributed classroom practice changes that the teacher reports still applying at least four weeks after the prompting peer learning interaction, used as a professional learning sustainability indicator for whether reported practice change persists into habitual teaching.

Indicator statement: Proportion of learners identified as below expected level in summative assessment who received at least one documented targeted learning support intervention in the following school term, disaggregated by learning level, gender, and community
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of learners identified as below expected level through summative assessment who received at least one documented targeted learning support intervention in the following school term, used as an assessment-to-action indicator for data-driven learner support.

Indicator statement: Whether the school or programme site has a current documented school improvement plan containing at least two specific measurable learning quality targets with named responsible persons and review dates, disaggregated by site type and geographic area
Indicator descriptor: Measures whether each school or programme site has a current documented school improvement plan containing at least two specific measurable learning quality targets with named responsible persons and review dates, used as an instructional leadership infrastructure indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of assessment tools in use that meet all three defined validity and appropriateness criteria covering learning level validation, language adaptation, and cultural appropriateness review, in the reporting year
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of assessment tools in use across the programme that have been validated for learning level, adapted for language of instruction, and reviewed for cultural appropriateness, used as an assessment quality infrastructure indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme teachers and facilitators who report adequate instructional leadership support across genuine interest, actionable feedback, and enabling conditions dimensions, assessed through anonymous annual survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme teachers and facilitators who report adequate instructional leadership support across genuine interest, actionable feedback, and enabling conditions dimensions, used as an instructional leadership effectiveness indicator from the teacher perspective.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme teachers and facilitators who report adequate working conditions across workload, class size, material availability, and physical environment dimensions, assessed through anonymous annual survey, disaggregated by site type and geographic area
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme teachers and facilitators who report adequate working conditions across workload manageability, class size manageability, material availability, and physical environment adequacy dimensions, used as a structural wellbeing indicator for teaching workforce sustainability.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme teachers and facilitators in post at the start of the school year who remained in post at the end of the same school year, excluding planned fixed-term exits, disaggregated by gender, years of experience, and site type
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme teachers and facilitators in post at the start of the school year who remained in post at the end of the same school year, excluding planned fixed-term exits, disaggregated by gender, years of experience, and site type, used as a workforce sustainability indicator.

Indicator statement: Proportion of programme teachers and facilitators who report adequate job satisfaction and intrinsic motivation across meaningfulness, satisfaction from learner progress, and sustained motivation under challenge dimensions, assessed through anonymous annual survey
Indicator descriptor: Measures the proportion of programme teachers and facilitators who report adequate job satisfaction and intrinsic motivation across meaningfulness, satisfaction from learner progress, and sustained motivation dimensions, used as a teacher wellbeing and workforce sustainability indicator.

Indicator statement: Whether the school or programme site has a functioning formative assessment system meeting all four defined criteria in the school term prior to the survey, disaggregated by site type and geographic area
